mapper.insert:
SELECT 'RP-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_REPLIES_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REPLIES (ID , REPLY , RECOMMEND_CNT , CRT_DT , MDFY_DT , EMAIL , ARTICLE_ID , PARENT_REPLY_ID , FILE_GROUP_ID) VALUES (#{id} , #{reply} , 0 , SYSDATE , NULL , #{email} , #{articleId} , #{parentReplyId} , #{fileGroupId})
mapper.select: SELECT R.ID , R.REPLY , R.RECOMMEND_CNT , TO_CHAR(R.CRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_DT , TO_CHAR(R.MDFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MDFY_DT , R.EMAIL , R.ARTICLE_ID , R.PARENT_REPLY_ID , R.FILE_GROUP_ID , M.NAME FROM REPLIES R INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON R.EMAIL = M.EMAIL WHERE R.ID = #{_parameter}
SELECT COUNT(R.ID) FROM REPLIES R INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON R.EMAIL = M.EMAIL WHERE R.ARTICLE_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT LEVEL , R.ID , R.REPLY , R.RECOMMEND_CNT , TO_CHAR(R.CRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_DT , TO_CHAR(R.MDFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MDFY_DT , R.EMAIL , R.ARTICLE_ID , R.PARENT_REPLY_ID , R.FILE_GROUP_ID , M.NAME , F.FILE_NUM , F.DISPLAY_NAME , F.FILE_LENGTH FROM REPLIES R INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON R.EMAIL = M.EMAIL LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT F.FILE_NUM , F.DISPLAY_NAME , F.FILE_LENGTH , FG.FILE_GROUP_ID FROM FILES_GROUP FG INNER JOIN FILES F ON FG.FILE_GROUP_ID =F.FILE_GROUP_ID) F ON R.FILE_GROUP_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID WHERE R.ARTICLE_ID = #{_parameter} START WITH R.PARENT_REPLY_ID IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR R.ID = R.PARENT_REPLY_ID
SELECT F.FILE_PATH FROM REPLIES R INNER JOIN FILES F ON R.FILE_GROUP_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID
SELECT F.FILE_PATH FROM REPLIES R INNER JOIN FILES F ON R.FILE_GROUP_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID WHERE R.ARTICLE_ID = #{_parameter}
